ship_threshold_check.documented_gaps: 56 dogfood failures concentrated in write-side mutator endpoints (api-keys create, communications create-quote/rfq, portfolio batch-create-orders, batch-cancel-orders, apply-subaccount-transfer, fcm get-fcmorders/positions). Each receives a synthesized placeholder request body that Kalshi's API rejects with HTTP 400/404 (exit 1/4/5). Real invocations with valid bodies work — auth signing verified, transcendence commands all return correct output. Documented in README ## Known Gaps.
